text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You know our day off yesterday? Well, I saw
the cuuutest black cat at the park.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I was drawing a magic circle on the ground and it
kept running around my feet! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It must have noticed that I'm a witch. I think
maybe it wants to be my familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm in such a good mood, I think I might just
try today!
